title: fix: trust only internal app automation branches
author: its3li
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- require app automation PRs to come from this repository before the rejection workflow updates linked issues
- apply the same same-repo guard to the app tier upgrade path

## Notes
The workflow runs on pull_request_target and currently trusts the auto/app-* head branch name by itself. This keeps the app-token issue/tier automation scoped to internal automation branches, not fork branches with the same name pattern.

## Testing
- git diff --check

gist.headline: Securing the hive's gates
gist.blurb: Tightened up our GitHub workflows to ensure app automation only runs on trusted internal branches. Keeping the hive safe and sound!
gist.summary: Updated the app tier upgrade workflow to require automation PRs to originate from the main repository rather than forks.
gist.impact: This prevents unauthorized forks from triggering internal issue updates and tier upgrades by spoofing branch names.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a friendly security guard checking a clipboard at a garden gate, representing the new branch trust verification.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, holding a clipboard and checking a glowing green checkmark on a retro terminal. A small wooden garden gate stands behind her. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
